title: 7 Herbal Tinctures For Fungal Infection
description: Echinacea purpurea tinctures contains alkylamides, caffeic acid derivatives, and phenolic acids as its bioactive constituents. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help combat fungal infections by reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. The alkylamides in Echinacea purpurea tinctures also exhibit antimicrobial activity, which can inhibit the growth of fungal cells and prevent the spread of infection.
